author_rating_explanation: Both focus authors are affiliated with the University of Luxembourg, which is a European research university but not listed among the top-tier European AI schools such as Oxford, Cambridge, ETH Zurich, or EPFL. The last author has strong citation evidence (OpenAlex cited_by_count=8070; works_count=412), but the institution falls outside the 6-8 top European band, placing this in the mid-tier range.
